title: Minty Mango Paneer Omelette
description: A refreshing breakfast omelette filled with the sweetness of mango and the coolness of mint, paired with the creaminess of paneer and a hint of spice.
instructions: In a bowl, whisk the eggs and season with salt.
Heat butter in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Pour in the eggs and let the omelette cook until the edges start to set.
Add the crumbled paneer, diced mango, chopped mint leaves, and chopped green chili on one half of the omelette.
Use a spatula to gently fold the other half over the filling.
Cook for another minute, until the eggs are almost set and the cheese is slightly melted.
Slide the omelette onto a plate and serve hot.
